de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput

    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util  

    • Uses of SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util that return SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractReturnVariableValueSequent(Services services, IExecutionContext context, Node methodReturnNode, Node methodCallEmptyNode, IProgramVariable variable)
      Creates a Sequent which can be used in site proofs to extract the return value of the given IProgramVariable from the sequent of the given Node.
      static SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractReturnVariableValueSequent(Services services, TypeReference contextObjectType, IProgramMethod contextMethod, ReferencePrefix contextObject, Node methodReturnNode, Node methodCallEmptyNode, IProgramVariable variable)
      Creates a Sequent which can be used in site proofs to extract the return value of the given IProgramVariable from the sequent of the given Node.
      static SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractTermSequent(Services sideProofServices, Node node, PosInOccurrence pio, Term additionalConditions, Term term, boolean keepUpdates)
      Creates a Sequent which can be used in site proofs to extract the value of the given IProgramVariable from the sequent of the given Node.
      static SymbolicExecutionUtil.SiteProofVariableValueInput SymbolicExecutionUtil.createExtractVariableValueSequent(Services services, Node node, PosInOccurrence pio, Term additionalConditions, IProgramVariable variable)
      Creates a Sequent which can be used in site proofs to extract the value of the given IProgramVariable from the sequent of the given Node.
